'''Golden A5 Wagyu''' is a '''very delicious''' food item that fills up a full hunger bar and gives you:

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Golden a five wagyu.png
| id = golden_a_five_wagyu
| type = Food
| stackable = 64
| Description = It tastes expensive...and funny?
| Subtype = Other
| Properties = Hunger points: 10/10

Regeneration II: 1min.

Resistance II: 1min.

Saturation II: 1min.
}}
*'''Regeneration II''' for '''1 minute'''.
*'''Resistance II''' for '''1 minute.'''
*'''Saturation II''' for '''1 minute.'''
Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!


If your dog gets [[Immortal Dogs|incapacited]] by starving, this is the '''only way''' you can bring it back.
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|Golden Nugget 
+ [[Training Treat]]

+ Steak
|[[File:Golden a five wagyu crafting.png|484x484px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.17.2.
<s>Not sponsored by SaltBae</s>
